steps.title: Identify the two nouns
steps.content: The blank fills with nation (a common noun) followed by Finland (a proper noun that names a specific country).

steps.title: Apply the appositive rule
steps.content: Restrictive appositives are not set off by punctuation. Finland is restrictive—essential to identify the member nation. A, B, and C all add punctuation, incorrectly treating Finland as nonrestrictive. That matches choice D — D is correct.
